name: ignitionsim
description: IgnitionSim.com — the engineer's guide to sim hardware. Compatibility-checked builds, honest gear reviews, and restock alerts for racing, flight, space, marine, and golf sim rigs.

scripts.build: node scripts/gen-llms.mjs && node scripts/make-llms-full.mjs && node scripts/audit-worldclass-quality.mjs && node scripts/audit-gold-standard.mjs && node scripts/audit-curator-system.mjs && node scripts/audit-public-surface-quality.mjs && node scripts/audit-editorial-surfaces.mjs && astro build && node scripts/prune-unverified-gear-images.mjs
scripts.gold-audit: node scripts/audit-worldclass-quality.mjs && node scripts/audit-gold-standard.mjs && node scripts/audit-curator-system.mjs && node scripts/audit-public-surface-quality.mjs && node scripts/audit-editorial-surfaces.mjs
